title: Leptogramma leptogrammoides
taxonomy: Leptogramma leptogrammoides is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This classification places it within the plant kingdom, specifically in the division Pteridophyta. Further classification includes the order Polypodiales and the family Dryopteridaceae. At the genus level, it is classified within the genus Leptogramma. The species is considered to be endemic to New Zealand.
